creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 180693
GitLab update to 8.14

Added the update to 8.14. Regarding this entry, the fix was incorporated into gitlab-shell 4.1.1 and GitLab 8.14.8.
Since the attached patch brings the needed gitlab-shell version and GitLab to 8.14.9 this will fix the issue. :)

But the patch is currently a draft and will hit the ports-tree next week after more testing.
